tutorial.welcomeA11y: Guided tour to get started with the app
tutorial.welcomeBody: In 2 minutes, I'll show you how everything works. But before creating anything, make sure to complete your settings — it's the key to truly personalised content!
tutorial.welcomeStep1: Discover each tool at a glance
tutorial.welcomeOptOut: I already know Tipote, don't show me this guide again
tutorial.completeHeading: Well done, you know it all!
tutorial.completeBody: You've seen all the tools. Now the most important step before creating anything: complete your settings so Tipote generates truly personalised content.
tutorial.completeTipDesc: Before creating, fill in your offers, refine your positioning and check your persona. Click your profile photo (top right) to access settings. The more complete, the better your content!
tutorial.completeTipOffers: Your offers — describe them so Tipote can weave them into your content
tutorial.completeTipPositioning: Your positioning — refine your target and message after onboarding
tutorial.completeTipPersona: Your persona — check that the ideal client profile matches your reality
tutorial.completeOptOut: Don't show me this guide again
tutorial.nudgeDesc: 2 min to discover each tool and know exactly what to do.
tutorial.tooltipToday: Today — your daily home page. Find your priority tasks, key stats and a summary of your progress.
tutorial.tooltipStrategy: Strategy — your personalised roadmap. 3-phase action plan, offer pyramid and target persona. You can adjust everything.
tutorial.tooltipCreate: Create — generate posts, emails, articles, video scripts, offers, pages, quizzes and editorial strategy. Each generation uses AI credits.
tutorial.tooltipContents: My Content — everything you've created, organised by type. Editorial calendar, publication scheduling, quiz and page tracking.
tutorial.tooltipTemplates: Templates — ready-to-use Systeme.io models, downloadable in one click. Included in your plan!
tutorial.tooltipCredits: AI Credits — your counter in the top right. Click it to see details or recharge.
tutorial.tooltipAnalytics: Analytics — enter your stats regularly so Tipote can refine your strategy and give you a personalised AI diagnosis.
tutorial.tooltipPepites: Gems — business tips that appear over time. The red badge means something new!
tutorial.tooltipSettingsProfile: Profile — your info, storytelling, offers and links. Access settings via your profile photo in the top right.
tutorial.tooltipSettingsConnections: Connections — connect your social networks to publish directly. Also set up your Systeme.io API key here.
tutorial.tooltipSettingsReglages: Settings — content language and key info about your business. The more complete, the better Tipote understands you!
tutorial.tooltipSettingsPositioning: Positioning — THE most important setting! Refine your target, message and positioning after onboarding. This powers all your content.
tutorial.tooltipSettingsBranding: Branding — your colours, fonts and logo so generated pages instantly match your brand.
tutorial.tooltipSettingsAi: AI & Credits — track your usage and customise the style of your auto-comments.
tutorial.tooltipSettingsPricing: Subscription — manage your plan: upgrade, downgrade or cancel independently.
tutorial.tooltipCoach: AI Coach — your personal adviser (PRO and ELITE plans). It knows your project and helps you make the right decisions.
tutorial.tooltipComplete: Tour complete! Before creating, go complete your settings: offers, positioning and persona. Click your profile photo in the top right.

upsell.title: Boost your engagement automatically
upsell.body: Auto-commenting allows Tipote to automatically comment on posts similar to yours to increase your visibility and attract new followers. Comments are AI-generated using your tone and style.
upsell.bullet1: 2–5 comments before and after each publication
upsell.bullet2: Style and tone personalised to your profile
upsell.bullet3: Varied angles: agreement, debate, question, elaboration

onboarding.title: Welcome to Tipote
onboarding.subtitle: A few questions to build your personalized strategy.

primaryGoal.question: Beyond money, what matters most to you?

businessObjectives.question: What do you want to achieve with your business first?

niche.question: Describe your niche by completing this sentence:
niche.description: Don't stress if it's vague, you can refine it later.
niche.objectivePlaceholder: e.g. launch their first digital product…

clientProfile.question: Tell me about your ideal client.
clientProfile.problemPlaceholder: e.g. they don't know where to start, they lack visibility…
clientProfile.failuresPlaceholder: e.g. too generic, not adapted to their situation…
clientProfile.futureLifeLabel: Their life after achieving their goal
clientProfile.futurePlaceholder: e.g. they finally have time for their family, they live from their activity…

timeAvailable.question: How many hours per week can you dedicate to your business?

biggestBlocker.question: What's your biggest obstacle right now?

contentPreference.question: Which types of content do you prefer creating?

platforms.question: Which platforms are you already on?

businessStatus.question: Where are you with your business?

options.has_offers: I already have offers for sale

hasAlreadySold.question: Have you already made sales (or received commissions)?

satisfiedWithOffers.question: Are you satisfied with your current offers?

options.rethink: I want to rethink them completely

clientTestimonials.question: Share 2-3 client testimonials (what they said or felt).
clientTestimonials.placeholder: e.g. "Thanks to you I finally launched my course!" — Marie

offers.question: What are your current offers?
offers.description: Add up to 3 offers with their details.

salesPageUrls.question: Do you have sales pages? Share the links.

monthlyCommissions.question: How many commissions do you receive on average per month?

audienceEmail.question: Do you have an email list?

audienceSocial.question: Do you have a social media audience?

urgentProblem.question: What urgent problem will you solve for your ideal client?
urgentProblem.description: A real problem that stresses them or blocks their progress daily.
urgentProblem.placeholder: E.g.: They can't find their first clients despite months of effort...

quickResult.question: What quick, visible and motivating result can you promise?
quickResult.description: A result that creates a "wow" effect within the first 7 days.
quickResult.placeholder: E.g.: Getting their first 3 qualified meetings in 7 days...

topObstacles.question: What are the 3 biggest obstacles preventing your client from getting this result?
topObstacles.description: The concrete blockers holding them back today.
topObstacles.placeholder:
E.g.: 1) They don't know how to position themselves
2) They're afraid to sell
3) They have no acquisition system...

uniqueMethods.question: What are your unique or innovative methods to help them?
uniqueMethods.description: What sets you apart: your secret method, your framework, your unique approach.
uniqueMethods.placeholder: E.g.: My 3-step method to create an irresistible offer without an audience...

offerFormat.question: In which format(s) do you want to offer your products?
offerFormat.description: Choose one or more formats that suit you.

uniqueness.question: Why is your offer unique and different from everything else?
uniqueness.description: What makes it an obvious choice for your client.
uniqueness.placeholder: E.g.: Because I combine X and Y in a way nobody else does...

refusals.question: Is there anything you absolutely refuse to do?
refusals.description: I won't include any of this in your strategy.

options.no_personal_branding: No personal branding (don't want to show myself)

nicheArea.question: What field will you build your business in?
nicheArea.description: Choose the field closest to your project.

automations.title: Automations

hero.title: Social Automations — ManyChat Style
hero.description: Detect keywords in comments and automatically send a personalized DM on Instagram and Facebook. Capture emails, send free resources — on autopilot.

automations.xNote: X/Twitter: DM API requires a Pro plan at $5,000/month — not viable. Threads: DM API is not yet available for developers.

setup.title: Setup required — Missing Supabase table
setup.description: Copy this SQL and run it in the Supabase SQL editor to create the automations table.
setup.instructions: Supabase → SQL Editor → New Query → Paste → Run

guide.title: How to activate your automations
guide.intro: Follow these 4 simple steps so your followers receive an automatic DM whenever they comment a keyword on your posts.

step1.title: Connect your Meta account
step1.desc: Go to Settings → Connections and connect your professional Instagram and/or Facebook account (Page or Creator Account).

step2.title: Check messaging access
step2.desc: From your Instagram account or Facebook Page, make sure DMs and messages are enabled in your privacy settings.

step3.title: Create your automation here
step3.desc: Choose a trigger keyword (e.g. PDF, GUIDE, PROMO) and write the message your followers will automatically receive in their DMs.

step4.title: Test with a comment
step4.desc: Post something on Instagram or Facebook, comment with your keyword and check that you receive the automatic DM within seconds.

rgpd.title: GDPR compliance — what we do
rgpd.description: The user initiates contact by commenting → implicit consent. Every DM automatically includes 'Reply STOP to unsubscribe'. Meta's 24h window naturally limits unsolicited messages.

empty.title: No automations yet
empty.description: Create your first automation to automatically reply to comments on Instagram and Facebook.

dm.title: Auto DM on Comment
dm.description: Post 'Comment PDF to get your free guide'. When someone comments 'PDF', they automatically receive your link via DM.
dm.example: Post: 'Comment PDF 👇' → Comment 'PDF awesome' → Auto DM with the link
dm.defaultMessage:
Hey {{firstname}}! Thanks for your comment 🙌 Here's your free guide: [YOUR_LINK]

Reply STOP to unsubscribe.

email.title: Auto Email on Comment
email.description: The user comments a keyword, receives a DM asking for their email, then gets the guide delivered to their inbox via systeme.io.
email.example: Comment 'GUIDE' → DM 'Send me your email' → Email sent → Added to systeme.io
email.defaultMessage:
Hey {{firstname}}! To receive your free guide, reply to this message with your email 👇

Reply STOP to unsubscribe.
email.defaultEmailDm: Got it! I'm sending your guide to {{email}} within the next few minutes. Check your spam folder if you don't see it 📬

form.name: Automation name
form.type_comment_to_dm_desc: Send a DM with a link or message
form.type_comment_to_email_desc: Capture the email and send to systeme.io
form.keywordHint: Case-insensitive — any comment containing this word will trigger the automation.
form.dmMessagePlaceholder:
Hey {{firstname}}! Here's your guide: [link]

Reply STOP to unsubscribe.
form.dmMessageHint: Use {{firstname}} to personalize. STOP will be added automatically if you forget.
form.emailCaptureHint: After the first DM, the bot waits for a reply with the email and sends it to systeme.io
form.emailDmMessage: DM message to request the email
form.emailDmPlaceholder: Reply to this message with your email to receive your guide 📧
form.systemeioTagHint: This tag will be assigned to the contact in systeme.io to trigger your email automations.
form.rgpdNote: Every DM will automatically include a STOP mention. The user initiated contact by commenting — this is the implicit consent compliant with GDPR and Meta policies.
form.targetPostPickError: Make sure your account is connected in Settings.
form.targetPostPickEmpty: No posts found. Make sure you have published posts on this account.
form.targetPostHint: Select the post on which you want to activate this automation.
form.commentRepliesPlaceholder:
It's in your DMs!
Let me know if you received it 👌
Check your private messages
Great, sending it in 2 min ✉️
Check your DMs!
form.commentRepliesHint: One variant per line. A random reply will be posted as a comment before sending the DM.
form.tiktokCommentRepliesPlaceholder:
Thanks for your comment! ...
Great, thanks for participating!
Happy to hear that! ...
Nice one, appreciate it!
Thanks for sharing your thoughts!
form.tiktokCommentRepliesHint: One variant per line. A random reply will be posted in response to the comment.
form.tiktokNote: TikTok doesn't provide a DM API. The automation will reply directly in a comment under the target post.

errors.tableNotReady: The Supabase table doesn't exist yet. Follow the setup guide above.

autoCommentPanel.title: Auto-comments
autoCommentPanel.descriptionEnabled: Automatically comment on similar posts to boost your visibility
autoCommentPanel.descriptionLocked: Upgrade to Pro or Elite to unlock this feature
autoCommentPanel.beforeTooltip: Tipote will comment on similar posts 2-15 min before your post goes live to generate upstream visibility.
autoCommentPanel.afterTooltip: Tipote will comment on similar posts 2-15 min after your post to extend engagement.
autoCommentPanel.upsellBody: Tipote automatically comments on posts similar to yours to increase your visibility. Available with Pro (€49/month) and Elite (€99/month) plans.
autoCommentPanel.unsupportedLinkedin: LinkedIn requires partner approval (MDP) — auto-comments are not available at this time.
autoCommentPanel.unsupportedGeneric: This platform does not support auto-comments at this time.
autoCommentPanel.policyWarning: Auto-comments on Instagram use the official API. Comments are posted on public posts related to your niche to increase your visibility.

videoUploader.videoStorageHint: The video will be stored in Supabase Storage — the URL remains valid even for scheduled posts.

createHub.contentGeneratedDesc: You can now edit it before saving

strategyDetails.addTaskDesc: Create a new task for your strategy

executionFeedback.softStartBody: Add 1–2 simple tasks and complete the first one today. Small steps, big impact.
executionFeedback.excellentPaceBody: You're in a great groove. Keep this level and just avoid overloading your day.
executionFeedback.goodCourseBody: You're progressing well. To level up, lock in a quick easy task first, then tackle the core work.
executionFeedback.relaunchBody: Pick ONE ultra-simple action right now (5–10 min) to regain momentum.
executionFeedback.oneStepBody: Start with the smallest possible task. The goal: a first check mark today.

markTaskDone.taskUndoneDesc: You can pick it up whenever you want.

onboardingNudges.lastStep: Last step to unlock your full strategy
onboardingNudges.chooseOffersDesc: Tipote generated 3 options. Select the one that best fits you to finalize your strategic plan.
onboardingNudges.finishStrategy: Let's finish the strategy + action plan
onboardingNudges.generateFullStrategyDesc: Your offers come to life: mission, positioning, persona and 3-phase action plan.

playbook.title: Playbook
playbook.aiIntro: AI will use your niche, persona and offers to suggest powerful ideas.
playbook.chooseTitlePrompt: Pick the title that resonates with you most:
tips_phase1_challenge: Offer priced between €97 and €500: full training format
Schedule the challenge at the beginning or middle of the month (people are broke at the end!)
Plan 80% promo pricing for the special challenge offer
VIP option: extra coaching sessions + bonuses + lifetime replay access
Non-VIP: replay available only from one day to the next
tips_phase1_webinar: Choose an offer between €97 and €997 depending on topic complexity
Schedule the webinar at the beginning or middle of the month (best conversion rates)
Plan a time-limited offer to create urgency
Exclusive bonus reserved for live attendees to encourage attendance
tips_phase2_challenge: Deliver maximum concrete value to demonstrate your credibility
Day 1: Intro + value + exercise / Day 2: Deep dive + exercise
Day 3: Action plan + exercise + offer pitch / Day 4: Live coaching + sales
Live coaching for the most active member = engagement boost
tips_phase2_webinar: Deliver maximum concrete value to demonstrate your credibility
Structure: Hook → Value content → Proof → Offer → Q&A
Ideal duration: 45 to 75 minutes (including the sales pitch)
Clean slides: 1 idea per slide, minimal text, lots of visuals
tips_phase3: Equipment: a decent mic + a good webcam
Live software: Zoom, WebinarJam, StreamYard... (plan for at least 500 attendees)
Set up recording for replays (you can resell them later!)
Practice to feel confident on the big day
Systeme.io or equivalent: simple branding (colors + photo)
tips_phase4_challenge: Create a private group (Facebook, Telegram, WhatsApp...) dedicated to the challenge
Group engagement: participant introductions + teaser video
Emails: teasing + value + curiosity + benefits + urgency
Share via email + social media (targeted groups)
Share a well-configured capture page with affiliate link
tips_phase4_webinar: Emails: teasing + value + curiosity + benefits + urgency
Share via email + social media (targeted groups)
Create a social media event to boost visibility
tips_phase5_challenge: Reminders: D-1 + morning of each day + 1 hour before the live
Post the daily exercise in the group after each session
Daily recap + motivation post in the group
Day 3: first mention of the offer (soft pitch)
Day 4: full sales pitch + open installment payments
tips_phase5_webinar: Reminders: D-7, D-1, morning of, 1 hour before, 15 min before
During the live: ask questions to keep the audience engaged
Present the offer at the right moment: after demonstrating value
Don't be pushy: show the transformation, not the product
tips_phase6: Send a recap email within 24 hours after the event
Follow up in the group + offer reminder with urgency
Follow-up sequence: D+1, D+2, D+3 (last chance)
playbook.tips_phase6_challenge_bonus: BONUS: relaunch the challenge in replay mode to resell the offer!
playbook.tips_phase6_webinar_bonus: BONUS: offer the replay to no-shows with a time-limited link!
playbook.tips_phase6_challenge_bonus2: BONUS: resell the special offer via the challenge replay
playbook.tips_phase6_webinar_bonus2: BONUS: create a mini-course from the webinar content

items.phase1_offer_challenge: Choose the offer to sell at the end of the challenge
items.phase1_offer_webinar: Choose the offer to sell at the end of the webinar
items.phase1_promo: Define the special promo (discount, bonus, limited spots...)
items.phase1_date_challenge: Set the dates (4 consecutive days recommended)
items.phase1_vip: Prepare the VIP option (coaching + bonus + lifetime access)
items.phase1_bonus: Prepare an exclusive bonus for live attendees
items.phase2_script_challenge: Prepare the content for each day
items.phase2_script_webinar: Prepare the script / key talking points
items.phase2_demo: Prepare a demo / real-world case study
items.phase3_capture: Capture page + thank you page created
items.phase5_exercises: Daily exercises shared in the group
items.phase5_engagement: Engagement questions prepared for the live
